metadata.title: Upcut — Viral clips from YouTube & Twitch
metadata.description: Generate vertical 9:16 and 1:1 clips with AI subtitles from a YouTube or Twitch URL.

hero.title: Paste a URL, get
hero.subtitle: Upcut finds the best moments in your YouTube & Twitch videos, reframes to 9:16 and adds subtitles — ready to post in minutes.

rows.title: 1h30 for a single clip
rows.desc: Find the right moment, cut, reframe to 9:16, subtitle, export. Then repeat for the next one.

rows.title: Tools built for editors
rows.desc: Premiere, After Effects, CapCut… hours of learning before a clean clip.

rows.title: Post less, reach less
rows.desc: Algorithms reward consistency. Every week without clips is a week of lost reach.

steps.title: It's that simple.
steps.subtitle: No plugin, no pro account, no timeline to master.

items.title: Paste the URL
items.desc: YouTube or Twitch: VOD, replay or long-form.

items.title: Export
items.desc: Download and post to TikTok, Reels or Shorts.

features.title: Everything included.
features.subtitle: You paste the link, you get your files — Upcut handles the rest.

ai.title: AI highlight detection
ai.desc: Whisper transcribes audio, GPT finds scroll-stopping moments — hooks, tension, reveals. Every clip gets a viral score before you even watch it.

items.title: Auto 9:16 reframe
items.desc: Subject stays centered, even on a 2h VOD.

items.title: Whisper subtitles
items.desc: Karaoke, Highlight, Minimal — baked into the MP4.

items.title: Viral score
items.desc: Every clip gets a predictive rating.

items.title: Auto or Manual mode
items.desc: AI picks, or you place the cursor yourself.

items.title: YouTube & Twitch
items.desc: VODs, replays, long videos — paste the link.

audience.title: Creators & streamers
audience.text: Your lives and VODs become Shorts without re-editing.

audience.title: Podcasters
audience.text: Best spoken excerpts, reframed and subtitled for social.

audience.title: Growth & social
audience.text: More hook tests, less timeline time.

audience.title: Small agencies
audience.text: Simple flow: URL → deliverable clips for clients.

pricing.title: Simple, no surprises.
pricing.subtitle: ~30 min source video · up to 10 clips

items.q: Does it work with Twitch too?
items.a: Yes. Paste a VOD or compatible content URL; the stream is processed as source video to extract clips.
Depends on video length and queue. Typically a few minutes for a standard video — track progress in your dashboard.
Yes. Transcription + styled subtitles on exported clips, matching TikTok / Reels / Shorts habits.
We count roughly 1 minute of source video per quota minute. Remaining time is visible in your profile per plan.
Yes. Manage your plan in settings; free tier stays commitment-free.

projects.emptyHint: Generate your first clip from home.

clips.INVALID_SEGMENT: Invalid segment (start too close to the end).
clips.LOW_SOURCE_QUALITY: The retrieved video resolution is too low for our clips (YouTube didn't provide enough pixels). Try with updated cookies, or upload an HD file.
clips.YOUTUBE_COOKIES_EXPIRED: YouTube refused the download (session expired). Update cookies in server environment variables.
clips.RENDER_FAILED: Clip rendering failed (unsupported video format or incompatible audio stream). Try again or upload the video in another format.
clips.UPLOAD_FAILED: Rendering completed but clip upload failed. Try again in a few moments.
clips.UPLOAD_EXPIRED: Your upload expired before processing started. Re-import the video and try again.
clips.NO_SEGMENTS_IN_WINDOW: No valid segment in the selected range. Try a longer or different range.
clips.BACKEND_TIMEOUT: Processing exceeded server timeout. Try again.
clips.BACKEND_SOCKET: Connection to clip server interrupted. Try again.
clips.BACKEND_ERROR: Clip server returned an unexpected error.
clips.BACKEND_JOB_LOST: Processing was interrupted on the server (restart or load). Restart generation.

s1.title: 1. Service overview
s1.body: Upcut is an online service that automatically generates short clips from YouTube or Twitch videos, with AI-generated subtitles. The service is published by Maé Prina (sole proprietor), Hennebont, France.

s2.title: 2. Acceptance of Terms
s2.body: By creating an account on Upcut, you accept these terms of service. If you do not accept these terms, you must not use the service.

s3.title: 3. Service access
s3.body: Upcut is available to anyone with an account on the platform. The service is currently in beta — interruptions or slowdowns may occur without notice. We do not guarantee permanent availability during this phase.

s4.title: 4. Use of the service
items: Use the service only for content you own or that is rights-free
Not submit illegal, defamatory content or content that infringes third-party rights
Comply with YouTube and Twitch terms of use
Not attempt to bypass service limitations
Not use the service for unauthorized commercial purposes

s5.title: 5. Content intellectual property
s5.body: You remain the owner of content you submit. By using Upcut, you grant a temporary license to process your videos solely to generate the requested clips. Generated clips belong to you. Upcut is not responsible for copyright violations by users.

s6.title: 6. Subscriptions and payments
items: Subscriptions are billed monthly via Lemon Squeezy
Payments are non-refundable except where required by law
You can cancel your subscription anytime in settings — access remains active until the end of the paid period
Unused credits do not roll over to the next month

s7.title: 7. Limitation of liability
s7.body: Upcut is provided "as is", especially during beta. We do not guarantee the quality or availability of generated clips. Our liability is limited to the amount paid for the current month. We are not liable for indirect losses, data loss, or service interruptions.

s8.title: 8. Termination
s8.body: You can delete your account anytime in settings. We reserve the right to suspend or delete any account for violation of these terms, without notice or refund.

s9.title: 9. Changes to Terms
s9.body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Users will be notified by email for substantial changes. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

s10.title: 10. Applicable law
s10.body: These terms are governed by French law. In case of dispute, competent courts are those of Hennebont (France).

s2.title: 2. Data collected
items: Account data: email address, username, password (encrypted)
Usage data: submitted video URLs, generated clips, job history
Billing data: managed by Lemon Squeezy (we do not store bank details)
Technical data: connection logs, IP address (via Supabase and Railway)

s3.title: 3. Processing purposes
items: Provide the clip generation service
Manage your account and subscription
Send transactional emails (confirmation, invoices)
Improve the service

s4.title: 4. Retention period
items: Account data: until account deletion
Generated clips: kept while account is active
Temporary video files: deleted after processing
Technical logs: 7 to 30 days depending on host

s5.title: 5. Sub-processors
items: Supabase — authentication and database (EU)
Railway — server hosting (USA)
OpenAI — audio transcription and AI analysis
Resend — transactional emails
Lemon Squeezy — payment and billing

s6.title: 6. Your rights (GDPR)
s6.intro: Under GDPR, you have the right to:
items: Access your personal data
Rectify inaccurate data
Delete your account and data
Object to processing
Data portability
s6.footer: To exercise these rights, contact us at {email}. You may also file a complaint with the CNIL.

s7.title: 7. Cookies
s7.body: Upcut only uses technical cookies necessary for the service (authentication session). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.
